title: Managed Detection & Response (MDR)
shortDescription: 24/7 continuous monitoring, threat hunting, and incident response.
description: Our MDR service provides round-the-clock security monitoring and advanced threat detection to identify and neutralize cyber threats before they impact your business.

process.title: Onboarding
process.description: Deploy sensors and integrate log sources.

process.title: Baselining
process.description: Establish normal network behavior.

process.title: Active Monitoring
process.description: Continuous threat detection and response.

faqs.question: Do you support our existing tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, our platform integrates with most major EDR, firewall, and cloud providers.

title: Penetration Testing
shortDescription: Identify and exploit vulnerabilities before attackers do.
description: Our ethical hackers simulate real-world cyber attacks to uncover weaknesses in your networks, applications, and physical security.

process.title: Scoping
process.description: Define the rules of engagement and targets.

process.title: Execution
process.description: Perform the simulated attacks.

process.title: Reporting
process.description: Deliver findings and remediation steps.

faqs.question: Will this disrupt our operations?
faqs.answer: No, we carefully scope and execute tests to avoid operational impact.

title: Vulnerability Management
shortDescription: Continuous identification and prioritization of security flaws.
description: We help you stay ahead of emerging threats by continuously scanning your environment, prioritizing vulnerabilities based on risk, and guiding remediation efforts.
problemsSolved: Lack of visibility into asset risks

process.title: Discovery
process.description: Identify all assets on the network.

process.title: Scanning
process.description: Run automated vulnerability scans.

process.title: Prioritization
process.description: Rank vulnerabilities by risk and impact.

faqs.question: How often do you scan?
faqs.answer: We offer continuous, daily, or weekly scanning based on your needs.

title: Cloud Security Architecture
shortDescription: Secure your AWS, Azure, and GCP environments.
description: Ensure your cloud infrastructure is built securely from the ground up, with proper identity management, network segmentation, and data protection.

process.title: Assessment
process.description: Review current cloud configurations.

process.title: Design
process.description: Architect a secure cloud environment.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Deploy security controls and policies.

faqs.question: Do you support multi-cloud environments?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have expertise across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

title: Digital Forensics & Incident Response
shortDescription: Rapid response to contain and recover from cyber attacks.
description: When a breach occurs, our DFIR team acts quickly to contain the threat, investigate the root cause, and restore your operations securely.

process.title: Containment
process.description: Stop the attack from spreading.

process.title: Investigation
process.description: Determine the root cause and extent of the breach.

process.title: Recovery
process.description: Restore systems and improve defenses.

faqs.question: Are you available 24/7 for emergencies?
faqs.answer: Yes, our incident response hotline is available 24/7/365.

title: Security & Compliance Advisory
shortDescription: Navigate complex regulatory landscapes (SOC2, HIPAA, PCI-DSS).
description: We guide organizations through the complexities of industry regulations, helping you achieve and maintain compliance while improving your overall security posture.

process.title: Gap Analysis
process.description: Identify areas of non-compliance.

process.title: Remediation
process.description: Implement required controls and policies.

process.title: Audit Support
process.description: Assist during the formal audit process.

faqs.question: Can you guarantee we will pass our audit?
faqs.answer: While we cannot guarantee an auditors decision, our clients have a 100% success rate after following our remediation plans.

process.title: Development

process.title: Deployment

title: API & Headless Development

process.description: Design a composable, API-first architecture.

process.title: API Build
process.description: Develop endpoints with strict authentication and rate-limiting.

faqs.answer: Headless allows for greater flexibility, faster performance, and the ability to seamlessly deliver content across multiple platforms.

title: Headless Web Development
shortDescription: Composable, blazing-fast, SEO-ready web experiences with decoupled architecture.
description: We build modern headless web applications that decouple the frontend from the backend, enabling teams to ship faster, customize deeply, and publish content across web, mobile, and IoT simultaneously. Powered by Next.js, React, and headless CMS platforms with CDN edge distribution.

process.title: Architecture Design
process.description: Define the decoupled frontend/backend structure and select the headless CMS.

process.title: Build & Integrate
process.description: Develop the Next.js frontend and wire it to content APIs.

process.title: Deploy & Optimize

faqs.question: Do my teams need to be technical to update content?
faqs.answer: No. Headless CMS platforms like Contentful or Sanity provide non-technical editors with simple, intuitive interfaces.

faqs.question: Can I integrate my existing systems?

faqs.question: Is WooCommerce secure?
faqs.answer: With proper hardening, SSL, and regular updates, WooCommerce is highly secure. We include security configuration in every build.

faqs.question: What is open data liberation?
faqs.answer: It is the process of extracting data from siloed systems, cleaning and standardizing it, and publishing it under an open license for public access and reuse.

faqs.question: Do you build open data portals?
faqs.answer: Yes, we build fully custom portals as well as configure established platforms like CKAN to host and manage your open datasets.

shortDescription: Proactive monitoring, security updates, and continuous enhancements to keep systems stable.
description: We keep your platforms running at peak performance with proactive monitoring, regular security updates, performance tuning, and ongoing enhancements. Our maintenance plans offer 24/7 uptime monitoring, 99.95% SLA, and a 12-hour response window for critical issues — so you can focus on your business, not your infrastructure.
problemsSolved: Unplanned system outages causing business disruption
Performance degradation over time without tuning

process.title: Baseline
process.description: Establish monitoring baselines, SLA definitions, and escalation procedures.

process.title: Operate
process.description: Continuous monitoring, proactive patching, and regular health checks.

process.title: Improve
process.description: Quarterly reviews with performance reports and roadmap for enhancements.

faqs.question: What does maintenance include?
faqs.answer: Security patches, dependency updates, uptime monitoring, performance tuning, bug fixes, and a regular health check cadence.

faqs.question: How often do you apply updates?
faqs.answer: Security patches are applied as soon as they are available. Feature and dependency updates follow a monthly or quarterly cadence depending on your plan.
